---
name: Public review feedback
about: Give CISO, security, platform, AI governance, or Microsoft/Azure ecosystem feedback
title: "Public review feedback: "
labels: ["public-review", "feedback"]
---

## Reviewer Perspective

Examples: CISO, security architect, platform engineer, AI governance lead, DevSecOps, Azure/Microsoft ecosystem builder, agent-framework developer, researcher.

## What You Reviewed

Examples: CISO overview, GitHub Actions pilot, recoverability engine, API, SDK, audit/replay flow, domain profiles, proxy benchmark.

## What Seems Useful

What part of SMERC appears potentially useful, if any?

## What Seems Weak Or Unclear

What would make you reject, delay, or challenge this project?

## Recoverability Question

Does the distinction between "allowed" and "recoverable enough to execute now" matter in your environment? Why or why not?

## Missing Evidence

What evidence would you need before taking a shadow-mode pilot seriously?

## Data Boundaries

Do not include secrets, private customer data, regulated data, confidential incident details, or non-public architecture diagrams in this public issue.
